name: sentinel-spec
description: Autonomous Architecture Compliance Reviewer for IBM Bob IDE. Captures policy violations at authorship time using IBM Granite.

MOCK_MODE.description: Set to true to bypass watsonx.ai and run evaluation using local mock regex engine.

WATSONX_APIKEY.description: IBM Cloud IAM API Key for watsonx.ai services.

WATSONX_MODEL_ID.description: Inference model ID to evaluate code violations.

COS_API_KEY.description: IBM Cloud Object Storage API Key.

COS_INSTANCE_ID.description: IBM Cloud Object Storage service instance GUID.

COS_ENDPOINT.description: IBM Cloud Object Storage regional/public endpoint.

COS_BUCKET.description: COS bucket name to record governance logs.
